description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to the master branch and on workflow dispatch. The workflow consists of two jobs: get-supported-boards and build. The get-supported-boards job checks out the repository, retrieves a list of supported boards by running a compile command, and uploads the list as an artifact. The build job depends on get-supported-boards, checks out the repository, downloads the supported boards list, installs the GitHub CLI, and then triggers a build for each board listed in the supported boards file by running a separate workflow with the board name as an argument.
